title: erigeron cronquistii
intro: Erigeron cronquistii, also known as Cronquist's fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erigeron cronquistii include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Erigeron cronquistii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk remedies for its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties.
